---
title: "Trial Methods Support"
---

## Advancing Clinical Trials Through Innovative Methods

The ACT-CTU provides access to specialized methodological expertise to support the design, optimization, and implementation of high-quality clinical trials.

Through the **Novel Trial Methods Hub**, investigators are connected with experienced methodologists to strengthen study design, improve feasibility, and enhance the likelihood of funding success.

---

## The ACT-CTU Novel Trial Methods Hub

The **Novel Trial Methods Hub** is a centralized, multidisciplinary platform designed to support investigators in developing next-generation clinical trials. :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0}

### What the Hub Offers

- Early-stage trial design support (prior to grant submission)  
- Protocol optimization to improve feasibility and efficiency  
- Access to advanced and innovative methodologies, including:  
  - Adaptive and platform trials  
  - Pragmatic and real-world trials  
  - Decentralized and digital trials  
  - Bayesian and advanced statistical methods  
  - Innovative endpoints and biomarkers  
- Support to strengthen grant competitiveness and trial success  

The Hub enables investigators to move from **promising ideas to fundable, future-ready trials**.




### Types of Support Available

- Protocol and Statistical Analysis Plan development  
- Adaptive and Bayesian trial design  
- Feasibility and pilot trial design  
- Early-phase and innovative trial methodologies  
- Real-world evidence integration  
- External control and single-arm trial design  
- Covariate adjustment and subgroup analysis  
- Estimands framework integration  


---

## Request Trial Methods Support

Investigators seeking methodological and/or statistical support from the ACT-CTU Novel Trial Methods Hub are invited to complete the intake form below.

👉 **[Download the Methods Hub Intake Form](../files/RI-MUHC_Methods_Support_Intake_Form.docx)**

Please complete the form and submit it by email to:

📧 **amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca**

---

## Submission Instructions

1. Download the intake form  
2. Complete all relevant sections  
3. Attach the completed document to an email  
4. Send to **amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca** with the subject line:

**“Methods Hub Request – [Your Name]”**

---

Early engagement with the Methods Hub allows us to provide more effective support and optimize your study design prior to funding submission.
---


## Key Contacts

**Dr. Philippe Boileau, PhD**  
Director, Novel Trial Methods Hub  
Email: philippe.boileau@mcgill.ca  

**Amanda Lovato**  
Operations Lead, ACT-CTU  
Email: amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca  

---

## Why This Matters

High-quality trial design is critical to success.

By engaging early with the Methods Hub, investigators can:
- Improve study feasibility and efficiency  
- Strengthen methodological rigor  
- Increase competitiveness for funding  
- Enhance the impact of their research  

The ACT-CTU is committed to supporting investigators at every stage of trial development.
